reasoning: The control 3.1.12 focuses on monitoring and controlling remote access sessions. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through audit logging to capture access events, configuring audit policies to ensure relevant events are logged, and using NetworkPolicies to restrict remote access to sensitive components. Additionally, ensuring that audit logs are retained for a sufficient period is crucial for monitoring and forensic purposes.
title: 3_1_12: 3.1.12 Monitor and control remote access sessions
